name: @napplet/cli
description: CLI for creating, configuring, building, and deploying napplets

scripts.package:binary: pnpm build && mkdir -p dist-bin && npx -y @yao-pkg/pkg@6.6.0 dist/bin.cjs --targets node20-macos-arm64 --output dist-bin/napplet-macos-arm64 && npx -y @yao-pkg/pkg@6.6.0 dist/bin.cjs --targets node20-macos-x64 --output dist-bin/napplet-macos-x64 && npx -y @yao-pkg/pkg@6.6.0 dist/bin.cjs --targets node20-linux-x64 --output dist-bin/napplet-linux-x64 && npx -y @yao-pkg/pkg@6.6.0 dist/bin.cjs --targets node20-win-x64 --output dist-bin/napplet-win-x64.exe
